controls.control_objective: To ensure interaction between the nbfc and its customers while carrying on its business
controls.control_description:
(4) 'Customer interface' means interaction between the NBFC and its customers while
carrying on its business.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to interaction between the nbfc and its customers while carrying on its business

controls.control_objective: To ensure 'housing finance company' as defined in reserve bank of india (housing finance companies) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
(5) 'Housing Finance Company (HFC)' means 'Housing Finance Company' as defined
in Reserve Bank of India (Housing Finance Companies) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 'housing finance company' as defined in reserve bank of india (housing finance companies) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean 'public funds' and 'customer interface' as defined in these directions
controls.control_description:
(6) 'Infrastructure Debt Fund-Non-Banking Financial Company (IDF-NBFC)' means a
non-deposit taking NBFC which is permitted to
Explanation: 'Public funds' and 'customer interface' shall mean 'public funds' and
'customer interface' as defined in these Directions.]
(15) 'NBFC-Peer to Peer Lending Platform (NBFC-P2P)' means 'Non-Banking
Financial Company - Peer to Peer Lending Platform' as defined in Reserve Bank of India
(Non-Banking Financial Companies - Peer to Peer Lending Platform) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean 'public funds' and 'customer interface' as defined in these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to them in the rbi act, 1934
controls.control_description:
Words or expressions used in these Directions but not defined herein and defined in the
RBI Act, 1934 shall have the same meaning as assigned to them in the RBI Act, 1934.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to them in the rbi act, 1934

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to them in the factoring regulation act, 2011
controls.control_description:
Any other words or expressions not defined in the RBI Act, 1934 shall have the same
meaning as assigned to them in the Factoring Regulation Act, 2011.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to them in the factoring regulation act, 2011

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the meanings respectively assigned to them under the companies act, 1956 or the companies act, 2013 (act 18 of 2013) as the case may be
controls.control_description:
Any other words or
expressions used and not defined in these directions or in the RBI Act, 1934 or Factoring
Regulation Act, 2011 or any of the Directions issued by the Reserve Bank, shall have the
meanings respectively assigned to them under the Companies Act, 1956 or the
Companies Act, 2013 (Act 18 of 2013) as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the meanings respectively assigned to them under the companies act, 1956 or the companies act, 2013 (act 18 of 2013) as the case may be

controls.control_objective: To ensure be consolidated for the above purpose, but it would not change the status of unregistered cics
controls.control_description:
However, in case unregistered Core Investment Companies (CICs) in the
group with asset size below ₹100 crore have accessed public funds, the asset size of
such CICs shall be consolidated for the above purpose, but it would not change the status
of unregistered CICs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be consolidated for the above purpose, but it would not change the status of unregistered cics

controls.control_objective: To ensure to certify the asset size (as on march 31) of all the nbfcs in the group every year
controls.control_description:
Statutory Auditors are required to certify the asset size (as on March 31) of all the
NBFCs in the Group every year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to certify the asset size (as on march 31) of all the nbfcs in the group every year

controls.control_objective: To ensure be furnished to the department of supervision of the reserve bank under whose jurisdiction the nbfcs are registered
controls.control_description:
The certificate shall be furnished to the Department of
Supervision of the Reserve Bank under whose jurisdiction the NBFCs are registered.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be furnished to the department of supervision of the reserve bank under whose jurisdiction the nbfcs are registered

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable for classifying an nbfc in the upper layer
controls.control_description:
Provisions contained in paragraphs 17 to 20 shall not be applicable for classifying
an NBFC in the Upper Layer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable for classifying an nbfc in the upper layer

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the regulatory requirements as per paragraph 34 of these directions, despite not having 9 substituted with effect from july 01, 2026 vid
controls.control_description:
Once an NBFC reaches an asset size of ₹1,000 crore or above, it shall be subject
to the regulatory requirements as per paragraph 34 of these Directions, despite not having
9 Substituted with effect from July 01, 2026 vide Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Registration, Exemptions and Framework for Scale Based Regulation) Amendment Directions, 2026 dated April 29, 2026.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the regulatory requirements as per paragraph 34 of these directions, despite not having 9 substituted with effect from july 01, 2026 vid

controls.control_objective: To ensure comprise of four layers based on their size, activity and perceived riskiness
controls.control_description:
Regulatory structure for NBFCs shall comprise of four layers based on their size,
activity and perceived riskiness.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comprise of four layers based on their size, activity and perceived riskiness

controls.control_objective: To ensure be known as nbfcs- base layer (nbfcs-bl)
controls.control_description:
NBFCs in the lowest layer shall be known as NBFCs-
Base Layer (NBFCs-BL).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be known as nbfcs- base layer (nbfcs-bl)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be known as nbfcs-middle layer (nbfcs-ml) and nbfcs upper layer (nbfcs-ul), respectively
controls.control_description:
NBFCs in middle layer and upper layer shall be known as
NBFCs-Middle Layer (NBFCs-ML) and NBFCs Upper Layer (NBFCs-UL), respectively.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be known as nbfcs-middle layer (nbfcs-ml) and nbfcs upper layer (nbfcs-ul), respectively

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as prescribed below: a
controls.control_description:
Details of NBFCs populating the various layers shall be as prescribed below:
A.1 Base Layer
10.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as prescribed below: a

controls.control_objective: To ensure comprise of: (1) non-deposit taking nbfcs below the asset size of ₹1,000 crore, (2) nbfcs undertaking the following activities:
controls.control_description:
The Base Layer shall comprise of:
(1) non-deposit taking NBFCs below the asset size of ₹1,000 crore,
(2) NBFCs undertaking the following activities:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comprise of: (1) non-deposit taking nbfcs below the asset size of ₹1,000 crore, (2) nbfcs undertaking the following activities:

controls.control_objective: To ensure consist of: (1) all deposit taking nbfcs (nbfcs-d), irrespective of asset size, (2) non-deposit taking nbfcs with asset size of ₹1,000 crore and above
controls.control_description:
The Middle Layer shall consist of:
(1) all deposit taking NBFCs (NBFCs-D), irrespective of asset size,
(2) non-deposit taking NBFCs with asset size of ₹1,000 crore and above, and
(3) NBFCs undertaking the following activities:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consist of: (1) all deposit taking nbfcs (nbfcs-d), irrespective of asset size, (2) non-deposit taking nbfcs with asset size of ₹1,000 crore and above

controls.control_objective: To ensure comprise of those nbfcs which are specifically identified annually by the reserve bank as warranting enhanced regulatory requirement based on the crit
controls.control_description:
5[The Upper Layer shall comprise of those NBFCs which are specifically identified
annually by the Reserve Bank as warranting enhanced regulatory requirement based on
the criteria provided in paragraph 24 of these Directions.]
A.4 Top Layer
13.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comprise of those nbfcs which are specifically identified annually by the reserve bank as warranting enhanced regulatory requirement based on the crit

controls.control_objective: To ensure move to the top layer from the upper layer
controls.control_description: Such NBFCs shall move to the Top Layer from the Upper Layer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to move to the top layer from the upper layer

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply in respect of the nbfcs: (1) nbfc-p2p, nbfc-aa, nofhc and 6[nbfc holding certificate of registration as 'type i nbfc'] will always remain in the
controls.control_description:
As the regulatory structure envisages scale based as well as activity-based
regulation, the following prescriptions shall apply in respect of the NBFCs:
(1) NBFC-P2P, NBFC-AA, NOFHC and 6[NBFC holding Certificate of Registration as
'Type I NBFC'] will always remain in the Base Layer of the regulatory structure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply in respect of the nbfcs: (1) nbfc-p2p, nbfc-aa, nofhc and 6[nbfc holding certificate of registration as 'type i nbfc'] will always remain in the

controls.control_objective: To ensure be
controls.control_description:
(2) NBFC-D, CIC, NBFC-IFC and HFC will be included in Middle Layer or the Upper
Layer (and not in the Base layer), as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean nbfc-bl and all references to nbfc-d (i
controls.control_description:
From October 01, 2022, all references to NBFC-ND (i.e., non-systemically
important non-deposit taking NBFC) shall mean NBFC-BL and all references to NBFC-D
(i.e., deposit taking NBFC) and NBFC-ND-SI (systemically important non-deposit taking
NBFC) shall mean NBFC-ML or NBFC-UL, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean nbfc-bl and all references to nbfc-d (i

controls.control_objective: To ensure existing nbfc-nd-si having asset size of ₹500 crore and above but below ₹1000 crore (except that necessarily featuring in middle layer) will be known
controls.control_description:
<image>
Provided that existing NBFC-ND-SI having asset size of ₹500 crore and above but
below ₹1000 crore (except that necessarily featuring in Middle Layer) will be known
as NBFC-BL.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to existing nbfc-nd-si having asset size of ₹500 crore and above but below ₹1000 crore (except that necessarily featuring in middle layer) will be known

controls.control_objective: To ensure be viewed on a standalone basis
controls.control_description:
NBFCs that are part of a common Group or are floated by a common set of
promoters shall not be viewed on a standalone basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be viewed on a standalone basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be consolidated to determine the threshold for their classification in the middle layer
controls.control_description:
The total assets of all the NBFCs
(including NBFCs which will always remain in Base Layer - NBFC-P2P, NBFC-AA,
NOFHC and 8[NBFC holding Certificate of Registration as 'Type I NBFC']) in a Group
shall be consolidated to determine the threshold for their classification in the Middle Layer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be consolidated to determine the threshold for their classification in the middle layer

controls.control_objective: To ensure be classified as an nbfc in the middle layer and consequently, regulations as applicable to the middle layer shall be applicable to them
controls.control_description:
If the consolidated asset (consolidation as per paragraph 17 above) size of the
NBFCs in the Group is ₹1000 crore and above, then each NBFC-ICC, NBFC-MFI, NBFC-
Factor and MGC lying in the Group shall be classified as an NBFC in the Middle Layer
and consequently, regulations as applicable to the Middle Layer shall be applicable to
them.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified as an nbfc in the middle layer and consequently, regulations as applicable to the middle layer shall be applicable to them

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be governed under the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - acceptance of public deposits) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
However, NBFC-D, within the Group, if any, shall also be governed under the
Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Acceptance of Public
Deposits) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be governed under the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - acceptance of public deposits) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to the idf-nbfc
controls.control_description:
For example, if an IDF-NBFC which is a group entity of a Scheduled
Commercial Bank, the regulations as applicable to NBFC - Upper Layer, other than the
requirement of listing, shall be applicable to the IDF-NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to the idf-nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be in middle layer as per the regulatory structure under scale based regulation
controls.control_description:
However, the IDF-NBFC shall
continue to be in middle layer as per the regulatory structure under Scale Based
Regulation.]
<image>
Chapter-III - Registration requirement
A.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be in middle layer as per the regulatory structure under scale based regulation

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as an nbfc and would be requiring registration under section 45ia of the act
controls.control_description:
Any company which carries on the business of a non-banking financial institution
as its principal business as defined in section 45I(c) read with section 45I(f) of the RBI
Act, 1934 shall be treated as an NBFC and would be requiring registration under Section
45IA of the Act.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as an nbfc and would be requiring registration under section 45ia of the act

controls.control_objective: To ensure be referred, which considers both the assets and the income pattern as evidenced from the last audited balance sheet of the company, and the same is as under: a company will be treated as an nbfc
controls.control_description:
Hence, in
order to identify a company as an NBFC, the following Principal Business Criteria as set
forth in Press Release 1998-99/1269 dated April 08, 1999 shall be referred, which
considers both the assets and the income pattern as evidenced from the last audited
balance sheet of the company, and the same is as under:
A company will be treated as an NBFC, if its financial assets are more than 50 per cent
of its total assets (netted off by intangible assets) and income from financial assets is
more than 50 per cent of its gross income.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be referred, which considers both the assets and the income pattern as evidenced from the last audited balance sheet of the company, and the same is as under: a company will be treated as an nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure to be satisfied as the determinant factor for determining principal business of a company
controls.control_description:
Both these tests are required to be satisfied
as the determinant factor for determining principal business of a company.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to be satisfied as the determinant factor for determining principal business of a company

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to the reserve bank, for deregistration, within a period of six months i
controls.control_description:
Existing 'NBFCs not availing public
funds and not having any customer interface', including those holding Certificate of
Registration as 'Type I NBFC', and fulfilling the prescribed criteria for exemption, may
apply to the Reserve Bank, for deregistration, within a period of six months i.e., by
December 31, 2026.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to the reserve bank, for deregistration, within a period of six months i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be aggregated
controls.control_description:
In case of multiple 'Unregistered Type I NBFCs' in the Group, the asset size of all such
'Unregistered Type I NBFCs' shall be aggregated.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be aggregated

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to applicable instructions issued by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
If the aggregate asset size is ₹1,000
crore or above, all 'Unregistered Type I NBFCs' in the Group are required to be registered
as 'Type I NBFC' and shall be subject to applicable instructions issued by the Reserve
Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to applicable instructions issued by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made through pravaah, on the company's letter head, with the following documents: note: the frequently asked questions (faqs) on exemptions and reg
controls.control_description:
(2) The application for deregistration shall be made through PRAVAAH, on the company's
letter head, with the following documents:
Note: The Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs) on exemptions and registration
requirements for 'NBFCs not availing public funds and not having any customer interface'
are available under Section H of 'All you wanted to know about NBFC'.]
B.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made through pravaah, on the company's letter head, with the following documents: note: the frequently asked questions (faqs) on exemptions and reg

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ₹2 crore
controls.control_description:
For NBFC-P2P, NBFC-AA, and 18[NBFC holding Certificate of Registration as
'Type I NBFC'], the NOF shall be ₹2 crore.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ₹2 crore

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ₹300 crore
controls.control_description: For NBFC-IFC and IDF-NBFC, the NOF shall be ₹300 crore.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ₹300 crore

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean holding the power to make or influence decisions in the trust and being the recipient of benefits arising out of the activities of the trust
controls.control_description:
Explanation: For this purpose, 'beneficial ownership' shall mean holding the power to
make or influence decisions in the trust and being the recipient of benefits arising out of
the activities of the trust.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean holding the power to make or influence decisions in the trust and being the recipient of benefits arising out of the activities of the trust

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated at par with those from the compliant jurisdictions
controls.control_description:
Investments in NBFCs from FATF non-compliant jurisdictions shall not be treated
at par with those from the compliant jurisdictions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated at par with those from the compliant jurisdictions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed to directly or indirectly acquire 'significant influence' in the investee, as defined in the applicable accounting standards
controls.control_description:
New investors from or through non-
compliant FATF jurisdictions, whether in existing NBFCs or in companies seeking CoR,
should not be allowed to directly or indirectly acquire 'significant influence' in the investee,
as defined in the applicable accounting standards.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed to directly or indirectly acquire 'significant influence' in the investee, as defined in the applicable accounting standards

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than the threshold of 20 per cent of the voting power (including potential voting power) of the nbfc
controls.control_description:
In other words, fresh investors (directly
or indirectly) from such jurisdictions in aggregate should be less than the threshold of 20
per cent of the voting power (including potential voting power) of the NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be less than the threshold of 20 per cent of the voting power (including potential voting power) of the nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure take registration as 'type ii nbfc', in case it intends to avail public funds and/ or have customer interface in future
controls.control_description:
(b) That the NBFC shall take registration as 'Type II NBFC', in case it intends to avail
public funds and/ or have customer interface in future.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take registration as 'type ii nbfc', in case it intends to avail public funds and/ or have customer interface in future

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain registration as 'type i nbfc' in case its asset size reaches ₹1,000 crore or above
controls.control_description:
(c) That the NBFC shall obtain registration as 'Type I NBFC' in case its asset size reaches
₹1,000 crore or above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain registration as 'type i nbfc' in case its asset size reaches ₹1,000 crore or above

controls.control_objective: To ensure disclose its status of being 'unregistered type i nbfc' and also disclose status of public funds and customer interface as part of notes to accounts t
controls.control_description:
(vi) Undertaking from the Board that the NBFC shall disclose its status of being
'Unregistered Type I NBFC' and also disclose status of public funds and customer
interface as part of Notes to Accounts to the financial statements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to disclose its status of being 'unregistered type i nbfc' and also disclose status of public funds and customer interface as part of notes to accounts t

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit an exception report to the reserve bank in case of violation of conditions on public funds or customer interface or any other condition for the
controls.control_description:
<image>
(4) The Statutory Auditors of the 'Unregistered Type I NBFC' shall submit an Exception
Report to the Reserve Bank in case of violation of conditions on public funds or customer
interface or any other condition for the exemption.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit an exception report to the reserve bank in case of violation of conditions on public funds or customer interface or any other condition for the

controls.control_description:
(5) 'NBFCs not availing public funds and not having any customer interface' and having
asset size of ₹1,000 crore or more, shall apply for registration as 'Type I NBFC' through
PRAVAAH, on the company's letter head, with requisite submissions and duly
accompanied by documents indicated at paragraph 38A(2)(i) to (iv) and 38A(2)(v)(a) to
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply for registration as 'type i nbfc' through pravaah, on the company's letter head, with requisite submissions and duly accompanied by documents in

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued by the reserve bank on being satisfied that the conditions for registration are fulfilled by the company
controls.control_description:
The Certificate of Registration as 'Type I NBFC' shall be issued by the Reserve
Bank on being satisfied that the conditions for registration are fulfilled by the company.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued by the reserve bank on being satisfied that the conditions for registration are fulfilled by the company

controls.control_objective: To ensure disclose in the notes to accounts to their financial statements that the company did not avail public funds and also did not have customer interface d
controls.control_description:
(6) Type I NBFCs shall disclose in the Notes to Accounts to their financial statements that
the company did not avail public funds and also did not have customer interface during
the year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to disclose in the notes to accounts to their financial statements that the company did not avail public funds and also did not have customer interface d

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit an exception report to the department of supervision of the reserve bank in case of violation of conditions on public funds and/or customer int
controls.control_description:
Further, the Statutory Auditors of Type I NBFCs shall submit an exception report
to the Department of Supervision of the Reserve Bank in case of violation of conditions
on public funds and/or customer interface.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit an exception report to the department of supervision of the reserve bank in case of violation of conditions on public funds and/or customer int

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ineligible for relaxed regulatory requirements as available to nbfcs holding certificate of registration as 'type i nbfc'
controls.control_description:
(7) Existing 'NBFCs not availing public funds and not having any customer interface'
which are not holding Certificate of Registration as 'Type I NBFC' shall be ineligible for
relaxed regulatory requirements as available to NBFCs holding Certificate of Registration
as 'Type I NBFC'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ineligible for relaxed regulatory requirements as available to nbfcs holding certificate of registration as 'type i nbfc'

controls.control_objective: To ensure invariably seek registration as 'type ii nbfc'
controls.control_description:
(8) For abundant clarity, it is reiterated that in case any of these NBFCs intends to access
public funds and/ or have customer interface, it shall invariably seek registration as 'Type
II NBFC'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to invariably seek registration as 'type ii nbfc'

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required to be registered with the reserve bank and be regulated like nbfc holding cor as 'type i nbfc' and shall also be governed as per the provi
controls.control_description:
(9) Notwithstanding the exemption granted at paragraph 65A of these Directions, if an
'Unregistered Type I NBFC' intends to undertake overseas investment in financial
services sector, it shall be required to be registered with the Reserve Bank and be
regulated like NBFC holding CoR as 'Type I NBFC' and shall also be governed as per the
provisions of paragraphs 15 to 19 of the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Undertaking of Financial Services) Directions, 2025 (as amended from time
to time), including prior approval of the Reserve Bank for the purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be required to be registered with the reserve bank and be regulated like nbfc holding cor as 'type i nbfc' and shall also be governed as per the provi

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake overseas investment in non financial sector
controls.control_description:
Further, the
'Unregistered Type I NBFC' shall not undertake overseas investment in non financial
sector.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake overseas investment in non financial sector

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to them only if specifically addressed to them, the reserve bank also retains the power to take action against 'unregistered type i nbfc
controls.control_description:
While Directions issued by the Reserve Bank shall be applicable to
them only if specifically addressed to them, the Reserve Bank also retains the power to
take action against 'Unregistered Type I NBFCs' under Chapter V of the RBI Act, 1934.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to them only if specifically addressed to them, the reserve bank also retains the power to take action against 'unregistered type i nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be viewed seriously and shall invite penal action under the provisions of the rbi act, 1934
controls.control_description:
Violation of any of the provisions applicable to 'Unregistered Type I NBFC' shall be viewed
seriously and shall invite penal action under the provisions of the RBI Act, 1934.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be viewed seriously and shall invite penal action under the provisions of the rbi act, 1934

controls.control_objective: To ensure be adhered to by all nbfcs <image>
controls.control_description:
The reporting requirements as prescribed by Department of Supervision of the
Reserve Bank shall be adhered to by all NBFCs
<image>
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be adhered to by all nbfcs <image>

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions, instructions and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of
these Directions shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: a
controls.control_description:
Further,
the repeal of these directions, instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way
prejudicially affect:
a.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such
investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted, continued, or enforced
and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions,
instructions, or guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being
in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in
respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these
Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
